title: qrafty's Bamboo Villages
description: This mod/datapack adds lagfree generating villages with 15 unique custom build structures to the bamboo jungle in your minecraft world! 🌍
body:
# Villages in the bamboo jungle. 🫐
In 1.20 the bamboo jungles were improved with a new wood type - but not a single new bamboo structure? So I added bamboo villages.
**Including:** 15 custom buildt structures generating random with each other. 

**This pack is part of my main datapack [qraftyfied!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)**

**I would be happy if you would join my [DISCORD!](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)**
